events.title: Whiskey Makes the Story Easier
events.description_intro: Our second annual installation of "Whiskey Makes the Story Easier," our spring dinner event, will provide fun, great food, drawings for bottles of whiskey, and education about our mission at the wonderful Angel's Share Whiskey Lounge in Long Beach, CA.
events.description_body: Last year was all about the children in Ukraine. While we will update attendees about our activities with kids overseas, this year is all about U.S. military war survivors.

events.title: Transformational Healing Retreat for Veteran Survivors V2.0
events.description_intro: A multi-day retreat offering trauma-informed workshops, outdoor practice, mindfulness, and peer support for U.S. veteran survivors — led by experienced facilitators and therapists.

events.title: Transformational Healing Event for Civilian Survivors
events.description_intro: A weekend gathering for civilian survivors of conflict — focused on embodied healing, shared community, and the quiet work of reconnection.

events.title: Healing the Heart Center — Long Beach
events.description_intro: A free one-day event for veterans on the effects of war on heart health — and paths toward healing through movement, nutrition, and mindfulness.
